Opcode.name: PCM_OP_CUST_FIND_PROFILE
Opcode.Doc: Used to locate profile objects linked to a particular account object. NOTE: If the PCM_OPFLG_READ_RESULT is passed in with this OP, the entire profile object is read (any collateral data hanging off of PIN_FLD_RESULTS array below is ignored).

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Routing POID. Only the 'database' sub-field is used.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_ACCOUNT_OBJ
Poid.Doc: The poid of the account to which this profile is attached.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_SERVICE_OBJ
Poid.Doc: The poid of the service to which this profile is attached. If this is specified, the search will be restricted further.

String.name: PIN_FLD_TYPE_STR
String.Doc: Type string of the profile to match. Some examples might be '/profile/foo' (match all of sub-types foo) or '/profile/f%'(match all profile objects that have sub-types beginning with the letter 'f'. If this field is left off, all profiles matching the above account object will be returned.

String.name: PIN_FLD_PARAMETERS
String.Doc: The optional field for use when subclassed information is being returned. Use this only if you specify subclassed information to be returned via. PIN_FLD_RESULTS parameter.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RESULTS
Array.Doc: Results array. Can specify fields to read comming back.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: The partial poid - passed in the input flist.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
